channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Shopping trolley and litter in multiple places, 14th May
item.description:
We have a litter problem. There's litter in the car park in Hackington Crescent and the surrounding grassy areas. There's a shopping trolley outside the block of flats to Hackington Crescent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hackington Crescent, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial bins, 14th May
item.description:
This area outside Gail’s and Oxfam has some LBH commercial bins, but it now also seems to have some domestic bins which shouldn’t be here and are being used as public litter bins for Gail’s customers. In addition, people fly top daily on the grassy area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lauriston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorcycle helmet abandoned, 14th May
item.description:
It's been there for over a week. Assumed it's been flytipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hackington Crescent, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on white utility box, 14th May
item.description:
Antisemitic graffiti on white utility box There’s graffiti depicting antisemitic caricature tropes on what looks like a white electrical box close to the entrance of the Blackwall tunnel northbound on tunnel avenue where there’s a bend in the road. I saw it today for the first time so I’m not sure how long it’s been there.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Developer keeps dumping rubbish onto pavement, 14th May
item.description:
Developer is not hiring skips instead they’re dumping rubbish outside their house onto pavement and street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fordyce Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Underside of Ha' Penny Steps Bridge (South), 14th May
item.description:
Graffiti on Underside of Ha' Penny Steps Bridge (South)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ha'Penny Steps, North Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rolled up carpet, 14th May
item.description:
On pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report dangerously parked hire limes bike, 14th May
item.description:
Report dangerously parked hire limes bike left attended outside TWG Tea on Withcomb Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Leicester Square, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed collection, 14th May
item.description:
100/102 George lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Mews, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish and debris all along Barth Road and the junction of Brookdene Road, 14th May
item.description:
There is an extremely large amount of rubbish and debris all along the bottom half of Barth Road and the junction of Brookdene Road, it has been there for at least a few days . Please clear it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike Danger, 14th May
item.description:
There are literally DOZENS of these bikes here. The parking bay is OVERSTOCKED. The bike the photo is completely blocking the footpath.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food litter, rubbish bags and bins all over the treet, 14th May
item.description:
The street pavement is strewn with food, bin bags, other household items and bins all over the street. This has caused a rat infestation and the once immaculate street has become an absolutely disgusting pit!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Forburg Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A dozen or more black bags, 14th May
item.description:
A dozen or more black bags dumped on grass verge
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brampton Road, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 14th May
item.description:
Trolley needs removing - it’s a Tesco one

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shaftesbury Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped food waste bins, 14th May
item.description:
Large amount of food waste bins dumped at the corner by the church.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in stairwell, 14th May
item.description:
Fly tipping in stairwell of 19-36 Forsyth Gardens. in addition to residents recycling there are many bags of flytipped waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-36, Forsyth Gardens, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car tyre dumped, 14th May
item.description:
Vehicle tyre dumped on the pavement. See photo. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 316, Bexley Road, Avery Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dry/dead branch hanging over our fence and into our garden, 14th May
item.description:
A tree located at the bottom of the allotments behind our property. The tree doesn’t appear very healthy, and one large branch is completely dry/dead. This branch is hanging over our fence and into our garden. It looks unstable and at risk of falling, so I’m concerned it could cause damage.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Lockesley Drive, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste bin needs removing, 14th May
item.description:
The Green waste bin that has been abandoned on the grass verge opposite 29-33 Regency Way needs removing, the label on the bin belongs to Saltash Road which as you can see from the map is some distance away!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regency Way, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Adjacent to Malvern rd NW6, 14th May
item.description:
For the 5 years I've lived here this drain had been blocked. Water sits on the surface and never drains away. Heavy rainfall means the road is flooded.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Place, London
Report on FixMyStreet
